title: Do you like Asuka 2nd Rei interaction
display_title: Do you like Asuka 2nd Rei interaction
wikitext:
[]: Do you like Asuka/2nd Rei interaction?             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Tue Sep 03, 2024 4:26 pm I found them very enjoyable. Askuka was keep picking on Rei due to some jealousy and she was not paying attention to her. While Rei didn't care but deep down thought Asuka was immature. And at some point she was gonna point that out.

[]: Re: Do you like Asuka/2nd Rei interaction?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Sep 03, 2024 10:23 pm I really do actually. I think the complement each other very well. And it's cool that, even though Rei didn't care, she tried to help Asuka. I don't know if it's because she knew Asuka and Shinji were friends or if she just felt like doing it. But Rei was being very honest with Asuka in the elevator scene.

[]: Re: Do you like Asuka/2nd Rei interaction?             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Wed Sep 04, 2024 5:52 pm Yeah, 2nd Rei is such a nice girl.

[]: Re: Do you like Asuka/2nd Rei interaction?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Oct 10, 2024 6:45 pm it certainly does an efficient job at showing off the contrast between them the bullying is pretty lifelike, especially that thing in ep 9 where you have the extroverted person/ more indirect communicator being pushy to get aknowledged and the introverted/ direct one tells them to back off or keep a 'professional distance' probably without awareness of how it could be taken as an insult or rejection i had some classmates just like Asuka, but I was no less clueless than Rei about how what I was probably needlessly pissing them off when i was her age. the combination introverted but direct is not so common, most of the time ppl picture the average introvert more like Shinji who is more over-polite & over-indirect than blunt. Generally the show does a good job of giving characters flavor by showing them having different reactions (a trick I personally stole as a writer.) You also see it with Misato & Ritsuko and how they always give a cynical & serious vs silly & optimistic response.
summary:

Askuka was keep picking on Rei due to some jealousy and she was not paying attention to her. While Rei didn't care but deep down thought Asuka was immature. And at some point she was gonna point that out.
